news_items.headline: Yankees' Rice to take his cuts in Home Run Derby
news_items.summary: New York Yankees slugger Ben Rice, who leads the team with 25 home runs, will be swinging for the fences during the Home Run Derby in Philadelphia on July 13.

news_items.headline: 3B coach Cora leaves Tigers during third season
Contreras, Ashcraft among ASG replacements list
news_items.summary: Willson Contreras headlines list of players selected as All-Star Game replacements.

news_items.headline: Brewers call up prospect Lara after 7-year deal
news_items.summary: Outfield prospect Luis Lara, 21, was called up to the Brewers on Tuesday before their doubleheader with the Cardinals.

news_items.headline: Polanco back in Mets' lineup after 3-month rehab
news_items.summary: Jorge Polanco returned to the New York Mets' lineup Tuesday after missing nearly three months with right wrist and left Achilles injuries.

news_items.headline: Twins put Buxton on IL with lingering hip injury
news_items.summary: The Twins placed Byron Buxton on the 10-day injured list Tuesday after the center fielder aggravated a hip injury that has lingered through much of the season.

news_items.headline: ⚾ Breaking down the MLB Home Run Derby field
news_items.summary: The sluggers who will be swinging for the fences in Philly are being named. Here's how they match up.

news_items.headline: Benge taps ball to the mound ... and turns it into Little League HR?!
Mets' Carson Benge hits 'Little League home run' after 3 wild errors to open game vs. Royals
news_items.summary: The Royals made three consecutive bad errors to turn Carson Benge's short ground ball into a Little League home run on Tuesday night.

news_items.headline: GUARDIANS AT TWINS: Bradley vs. Cantillo, discussion
Pirates breakout star pitcher Braxton Aschcraft officially named to NL All-Star team
news_items.summary: Ashcraft has arguably been one of the best starting pitchers in all of baseball this season and has been rewarded.

news_items.headline: With winless drought nearing historic territory, Skenes faces Braves
Game Discussion for St. Louis Cardinals vs Milwaukee Brewers Game 2 Tuesday
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals will play game 2 of their day/night doubleheader Tuesday against the Milwaukee Brewers with Hunter Dobbins getting the start for the birds. The Brew Crew will assign night pitching duties to Robert Gasser who’s 1-3 with a 4.54 ERA. First pitch scheduled for 6:45pm central time with the game broadcast available […]

news_items.headline: Game 91 Game Day Thread – Anaheim Angels @ Texas Rangers
news_items.summary: Will 7/7 be a lucky deGrom day?

news_items.headline: Yankees' Ben Rice to get his Home Run Derby dream with dad pitching
news_items.summary: The Yankees slugger has carried the offense with Aaron Judge hurt. Now he gets to live a childhood dream with his dad throwing to him in Philadelphia.

news_items.headline: Diamondbacks Reacts Survey: 99 Problems…
news_items.summary: Welcome to SB Nation Reacts, a survey of fans across the MLB. Throughout the year we ask questions of the most plugged-in Diamondbacks fans and fans across the country.
